sutta: 175 the variable upon came to visit the variable sariputta etc and said this to him pray sariputta your reverence is there an end maker by knowledge stop here for a while and maker is antakaro that means 1 who has made an n is basically an arahant and then verbal sariputta said not in this case your reverence and then verbal uppabana said again then your reverence is then end maker by conduct not in this case your reverence then is there an end maker by knowledge and conduct not in this case your reverence what then your reference is then end maker by any other way than knowledge and conduct not in this case your reverence sariputta your reverence when asked is there any end maker by knowledge by conduct by knowledge and conduct and is there any other way you reply not in this case your reverence in what way then your reverence is there an end maker and variable if there were an end maker by knowledge he would still be an end maker with grasping or with basis padano if there were 1 by conduct by knowledge and conduct he would still be an end maker with grasping if your reverence never an end maker by any other way then by knowledge and conduct then the ordinary man would be an end maker now your reverence the only man living apart from knowledge and conduct being unversed in conduct knows not sees not things as they really are but if he be practiced in conduct he knows he sees things as they really are so knowing so seeing he is an end maker and this uh whenever sariputta says that there is basically a no end maker no arahan because if you say that there is a handmaker or an arahanna then there would still be a basis for rebirth in other words this teaching here is a bit similar to some uh teachings by some hindu saints namely that there is no person to be liberated uh if we if we think that um there is a person to be liberated then we don't understand that is why sometimes uh some people they think that they are already an arya and they think i have become an arya but arya does not think that i have become an arya he just knows that there is attainment and he's not eager also to for others to to know nowadays sometimes some people think that they are and they are very eager for other people to know and if other people don't accept no i don't believe that they are yes then they get very annoying and that this proves that they are not ariana so here we have to know basically there is nothing to attain there is just as long as our mind is working we think there is a self we think that we we have to strive to get our samsara all this uh striving to get out samsara is still in that realm of delusion but then um we still have to strive only thing is sometimes we strive too hard we don't get to see things as they really are 1 of the important qualities and the holy path is upeka equanimity it's only when the mind is calm and economists are not agitated and that we see things as they really are today we come to suta number
